message:
test(causal_dag): expand proptest from 6 to 27 properties (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Adds 21 new property-based tests: TE edge cases (short input, zero bins),
approximate determinism, permutation test p-value bounds, PaneTimeSeries
capacity enforcement/is_empty/read idempotency, CausalDagConfig serde
roundtrip and defaults, CausalEdge/CausalDagSnapshot serde roundtrips,
CausalDag register/unregister count, update_count incrementing, snapshot
consistency, no self-loop edges, observe on unregistered pane no-op.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
